emails.subject: Re: Thursday's P/L
emails.body: Re: Thursday's P/L Thanks. I don't think that there should be a fin gd swap position of 12 lots in the mojave index column. Please check to see how the deal was booked. Thanks, Mike

emails.subject: Thursday's P/L
emails.body: Thursday's P/L Phillip: You will get a kick out of this. Tommorow, Gossett is going to give us a quiz to see what we know, and what we do not know. I am sure all of your lessons will pay off. Have a good evening. Anne
